form.formComment: Resumes after a break of 14 months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign by 0.5 len Kyneton Mdn-Sw February 27 2025 over 1856m defeating Amourente with 59.5kg at $6.50. When resuming last campaign third of 8 at Great Western Mdn-Sw January 25 2025 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Oh So Thrilling with 59.5kg at $3.40. Looks all set for a positive return.

form.formComment: Comes off a 29 day let-up. Most recently sat on the pace before fading to run last of 8 at Ipswich Cl1 on March 14 over 1666m, 20 len behind Trump Card carrying 55.5kg at $21. The run before that made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 10 at Werribee 0 - 56 on February 1 over 2256m, 1.5 len behind Nicoffhome with 59.5kg at $4. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.75 len at this track 4yo+ Mdn-Sw March 29 over 1400m in soft going defeating Eraja with 58kg at $3.50. Before that 5th of 12 at Ipswich Mdn-Sw on February 26 over 1700m, 2.25 len behind Pass The Peak with 58.5kg at $14. Looks suitably placed here and expected to measure up again.

Needs to go to another level to match these.
